text: Cypress is a JavaScript end-to-end testing framework that runs directly in the browser, providing real-time reloading, automatic waiting, and time-travel debugging

Cypress is a JavaScript end-to-end testing framework that runs directly in the browser, providing real-time reloading, automatic waiting, and time-travel debugging. It competes with Selenium and Playwright. Cypress runs in the same event loop as the application.
Key features: automatic retries and waiting (no `sleep()`), screenshots and videos of test runs, component testing (Cypress 10+, mounts React/Vue components), network stubbing (`cy.intercept()`).
